title: ageratina zinniifolia
intro: Ageratina zinniifolia, also known as White Cloud, is a perennial plant in the mint family native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of Ageratina zinniifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, reduce inflammation and pain, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Ageratina zinniifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
